production.playableLoop: Move the Soldier through a UE-style physics test course, clear two checkpoint pads, avoid moving sweepers, push through crates, and cross the finish pad.
production.objective: Clear both checkpoint pads and reach the glowing finish pad.
production.progression: The route escalates from flat movement to stairs, a ramp, a ledge platform, pushable crates, sweep hazards, and a finish gate.
production.failRetry: Hazard hits are counted in HUD state; press R to reset the course.
feedbackMoments: Soldier movement switches between idle, walk, and Shift-held run animation clips.
Checkpoint, hit, timer, and finish state update retained HUD bindings.
Moving sweepers and pushable crates provide physics-course feedback.

assetPlan.playerHero: Three.js example Soldier.glb is used as the humanoid with Idle, Walk, and Run clips declared in structured asset source.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Authored sweep hazards, stairs, ramp, ledge, walls, and pushable crates provide obstacle-course surfaces with collider metadata.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Checkpoint pads and finish pad are authored trigger/interactable surfaces with emissive material treatment.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Textured UE-style floor, walls, backdrop, lighting, ramps, stairs, and set-dressing markers build the course environment.
assetPlan.uiHud: Retained HUD binds objective, checkpoint, hit, and timer text from GameState.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Starter goal-ping audio asset is available for feedback wiring.

highValueSurfaces.summary: Starter player entity is source-owned placeholder geometry intended to be replaced by catalog, kit, or authored custom art.
No obstacle/enemy is authored in the starter baseline.
Goal zone is the starter reward/interactable surface.
Arena floor, camera, light, and goal context provide the starter world surface.
Starter HUD/source UI is the baseline for objective and state text.
Starter goal-ping audio asset is available for feedback wiring.

uiStates.expectation: Pause state is represented in retained UI source.
Settings state is represented in retained UI source.
Loading state is represented in retained UI source.
Retry state is represented in retained UI source.
Win milestone state is represented in retained UI source.
Touch mobile-control state is represented in retained UI source.

assetSourcing: Catalog search was run for rpg-adventure direct GLB records; user-specified Three.js Soldier.glb is used for the humanoid and documented in docs/asset-provenance.md.
knownBlockers: Three.js Soldier.glb licensing is inherited from the upstream three.js examples repository; preserve source URL and dev ref in docs/asset-provenance.md.
